name: Warm Asparagus with Tarragon Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the asparagus by discarding woody ends.
2. Steam the spears whole for about 3 or 4 minutes until just tender when pierced with a fork; do not overcook.
3. Rinse in cold water and drain.
4. In a small bowl, combine olive oil, mustard, vinegar, salt, pepper, shallots, and tarragon. Stir until well mixed.
5. Arrange the still-warm asparagus on a serving plate.
6. Pour the dressing over the asparagus.
Serves 3 or 4.
Per Serving: 270 calories, 3 g protein, 6 g carbohydrate, 28 g fat (4 g saturated), 0 mg cholesterol, 234 mg sodium, 1 g fiber.
